scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=server & npm run dev --workspace=client
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test --workspace=client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=server && npm run lint --workspace=client
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace=server && npm run format --workspace=client
